name: Laura Set — Royal Emerald
description: Crafted for the woman who commands attention without saying a word. The Royal Emerald Laura Set blends rich emerald tones with gold embroidery inspired by West African royal courts. The flowing boubou top features intricate pattern work along the neckline, paired with matching wide-leg trousers that move with effortless grace. Whether you're at a wedding, a formal dinner, or celebrating a milestone, this set speaks the language of confidence and cultural pride.

name: Laura Set — Sunset Terracotta
description: Like the golden hour over the Savannah, this set captures warmth in every thread. The Sunset Terracotta Laura Set features hand-dyed fabric in rich burnt orange tones, with subtle gold accents catching the light as you move. The structured silhouette flatters every body type, while the matching trousers offer both comfort and elegance. Perfect for summer events, garden parties, or any occasion that calls for a bold statement.

name: Laura Set — Midnight Noir
description: For evenings that demand sophistication. The Midnight Noir Laura Set is a masterclass in understated luxury — deep black fabric with rose gold embroidery that catches the light like stars at midnight. The flowing silhouette moves beautifully, while the tailored details ensure you look polished from every angle. Pair with gold jewelry and let the set do the talking.

name: Laura Set — Golden Safari
description: Inspired by the golden grasses of the African savannah at dusk. This set combines warm amber tones with subtle geometric patterns that echo traditional Adinkra symbols. The comfortable fit makes it perfect for all-day wear — from brunch to evening cocktails. The Golden Safari Laura Set is for the woman who lives life on her own terms.

name: Laura Set — Rose Gold Dream
description: A celebration of femininity and strength. The Rose Gold Dream features our signature rose gold fabric with intricate embroidery along the sleeves and hem. The set includes a beautifully draped top and matching palazzo pants that create a stunning silhouette. Perfect for special occasions, engagement parties, or any moment worth remembering.

name: Laura Set — Ivory Classic
description: Timeless elegance redefined. The Ivory Classic Laura Set is a fresh take on traditional African formal wear. Cream and ivory tones create a soft, sophisticated palette, while delicate pattern work adds visual interest without overwhelming. This set transitions effortlessly from daytime events to evening celebrations.

name: Laura Set — Sage Serenity
description: For the calm, confident woman who knows her power. Sage Serenity combines muted green tones with soft cream accents for a look that's both grounding and luxurious. The relaxed fit is forgiving yet flattering, making it perfect for everyday elegance or relaxed special occasions.

name: Short Bubu — Sunny Days
description: Effortless tropical elegance. The Sunny Days Short Bubu is designed for warm-weather celebrations. The relaxed silhouette features a flowing top that falls to mid-thigh, with matching shorts underneath for modesty and comfort. Vibrant yellows and oranges bring the energy of a perfect summer day to your wardrobe.

name: Short Bubu — Ocean Deep
description: Inspired by the depths of the Atlantic. Ocean Deep features rich blue tones layered with teal and gold accents that shimmer like sunlight on water. The relaxed fit is perfect for coastal celebrations, beach weddings, or any event where you want to bring a piece of paradise to your style.

name: Short Bubu — Warm Sand
description: Inspired by African desert dunes at golden hour. Warm Sand brings earthy neutrals together in a harmonious palette of sand, terracotta, and cream. The relaxed bubu style is comfortable for all-day wear while still making a statement. Perfect for cultural celebrations, naming ceremonies, or casual elegant events.

name: Short Bubu — Coral Reef
description: Vibrant, bold, unforgettable. The Coral Reef Short Bubu captures the beauty of underwater ecosystems in a wearable work of art. Rich coral tones mix with teal and gold in a pattern that's both eye-catching and sophisticated. This set is for the woman who isn't afraid to be seen.

name: Short Bubu — Forest Whisper
description: Mysterious and grounding. Forest Whisper draws from the ancient forests of the African continent, using deep greens and earth tones to create a look that feels both natural and luxurious. The relaxed silhouette is perfect for outdoor events and cultural gatherings.

name: Short Bubu — Lavender Mist
description: Unexpected and enchanting. Lavender Mist breaks from traditional color palettes with a soft, modern approach to African print fashion. The gentle purple tones are complemented by silver and cream accents, creating a look that's contemporary yet culturally grounded.

name: Short Bubu — Rust Vintage
description: A nod to heritage and history. Rust Vintage uses deep burnt orange and brown tones reminiscent of aged terracotta and traditional pottery. The colorway celebrates African craftsmanship and artisanship. This bubu is for those who appreciate the beauty of the past while living firmly in the present.

name: 2-Piece Set — Mosaic Magic
description: Art you can wear. Mosaic Magic features a geometric pattern inspired by traditional African mosaic work, combining deep burgundy, gold, and cream in a striking visual composition. The two-piece set includes a fitted crop top and flowing wide-leg trousers that create a stunning silhouette perfect for special occasions.

name: 2-Piece Set — Golden Hour
description: Capturing the magic of Africa's golden hour. This stunning set features warm amber and terracotta tones with intricate gold embroidery along the neckline and hem. The crop top and matching trousers create a cohesive look that's both modern and deeply rooted in tradition.

name: 2-Piece Set — Navy Regal
description: Commanding presence meets refined elegance. Navy Regal is a sophisticated two-piece set in deep navy with gold accents that evoke the regalia of African royalty. The tailored fit ensures a polished appearance, while the rich colors make a lasting impression at any formal event.

name: 2-Piece Set — Emerald Jungle
description: Vibrant and alive. Emerald Jungle draws inspiration from the lush rainforests of the Congo basin, using rich greens with touches of gold and cream. The bold pattern makes a statement while the classic two-piece silhouette keeps the look refined and sophisticated.

name: 2-Piece Set — Blush Glow
description: Soft strength. Blush Glow offers a feminine interpretation of African print fashion with soft pinks, rose gold, and cream in an elegant pattern. The two-piece set is perfect for weddings, anniversaries, or any celebration where you want to feel both powerful and pretty.

name: 2-Piece Set — Midnight Jewel
description: Jewel of the night. Midnight Jewel transforms evening wear with deep purple and violet tones accented by gold thread work. The two-piece set includes a halter-style crop top and matching trousers, creating a look that's dramatic, sophisticated, and unforgettable.
